situation: Rebuilding credit performance slides - DQ and C/O numbers did not match template
lesson: Always find the source SQL before writing your own. The template used: (1) DQ = ADB methodology (avg daily balance of dq_bucket=2 / avg daily total balance), not EOM snapshot; (2) C/O = rollforward methodology where charge-off amount is balance on min(charge_off_dt)-1 (day before flag flips), not dt=charge_off_dt; (3) dq_bucket=2 is the 30-59 DPD bucket code. Source SQL: ds_dq30_historical.sql and loc_acct_rollforward.sql in .github/sql/.
